extortion.description: futurbath.com Futurbath is a consolidated Spanish company with over 25 years of experience in the design, production, and wholesale distribution of high-end bathroom and kitchen furniture, accessories, and ceramics . Based in Fuenlabrada, Madrid, the company operates its own strategically located factories in Spain and Asia, allowing it to control the entire production process and maintain efficient logistics from a central warehouse .
